prompt: A highly detailed anime fantasy illustration of a tall elegant woman resembling an ice sorceress or qilin-inspired warrior, shown in a full-body three-quarter back view with her head turned slightly away, standing in a luminous snowy mountain landscape filled with soft pink cherry blossoms. She has very light icy blue hair, extremely long, thick, and flowing in the wind with layered strands, soft bangs, curled tips, and a loose ahoge on top. Two dark curved horn-like ornaments with subtle red patterning rise from either side of her head. Her face is obscured by a flat rectangular blur block in a pale lavender-gray tone. She wears an ornate fantasy bodysuit and dress in black, white, periwinkle, and sapphire blue with gold filigree armor details: a black fitted chest piece, detached translucent bell sleeves with blue crystal-like feather cuffs, a backless white-and-blue upper garment, intricate gold waist armor with a glowing blue gemstone centerpiece, sheer black tights with gold geometric accents, layered translucent blue fabric panels, and exactly 3 visible red tassel ornaments hanging from the waist and side sashes. Her right arm is extended with an open gloved hand, levitating a glowing translucent blue water sphere containing swirling yin-yang-like currents. Around her are curling arcs of water and icy energy ribbons. The background is a dreamy ethereal alpine scene with 1 distant pagoda-like tower on the right, misty snow-covered peaks, frosted trees, sparkling atmosphere, drifting petals, and pastel blossom clusters framing the foreground and upper left corner. Use soft radiant backlighting, iridescent highlights, polished anime rendering, delicate gradients, crisp decorative costume detail, magical fantasy mood, cool blue and lavender palette with pink accents, vertical composition, no text, no extra characters.
